allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(''''/dev/stdin'''',''''utf8''''\)\); console.log\(''''Total products:'''', d.length\); console.log\(''''Sample image:'''', d[0].image\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./src/data/products.json''\); console.log\(''Sample local path:'', d[0].image\); const ext = d.filter\(p=>p.image.startsWith\(''http''\)\); console.log\(''Still external:'', ext.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./src/data/products.json''\); const ext=d.filter\(p=>p.image.startsWith\(''http''\)\); const loc=d.filter\(p=>p.image.startsWith\(''/''\)\); console.log\(''외부URL:'', ext.length, ''로컬:'', loc.length\); console.log\(''샘플:'', d[0].image, d[1].image\);")
